desc_initial: Describe your dream trip and I'll create a detailed itinerary
desc_with_draft: Refine your trip or save it when ready
draft_placeholder: Your AI-generated itinerary will appear here
draft_placeholder_sub: Cities, dates and activities: generated after your prompt
empty_draft_cities: Draft is empty. Ask the AI to add something.
error_plan_desc: Could not generate trip. Please try again.
error_rate_limited: Too many AI requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
error_save: Failed to save trip. Please try again.
page_desc: Plan your perfect trip with AI assistance
page_subtitle: Describe the trip you want, I’ll draft it and we’ll refine it together
prompt_placeholder_initial: E.g., 5 days in Rome with Vatican, Colosseum, and best pasta restaurants…
prompt_placeholder_refine: E.g., Add a day trip to Tivoli, change hotels to city center…
refine_hint: Try "+1 day in Lisbon" or "drop Seville"
status_generating: Picking cities and laying out your route, day by day
status_ready: Draft is ready. Refine with another prompt or save it.
status_saving: Building the trip: adding cities and dates
status_waiting: Waiting for a prompt. Describe your trip in a paragraph, I'll draft an itinerary and we can refine it here.
title: Plan with AI
